title: Pune Horror: Four-Year-Old Girl Sexually Assaulted, Murdered in Bhor; 65-Year-Old Man Arrested
description: A four-year-old girl was allegedly murdered in Nasrapur village, Pune. A 65-year-old man has been arrested. The girl was missing since Friday afternoon, and her body was discovered in a cattle shed after a search. Villagers protested outside the police station after her body was found, demanding immediate action.
